summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CapyMatch attention system overhaul (iteration 226). All 9 test cases passed. The hero carousel correctly shows ONLY heroEligible items (Emory and Stanford with coach flags). Medium-tier items (UCLA, Florida) appear in 'Keep things moving' section. Low-tier item (Creighton) appears in 'Just keep an eye' section.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing re-seeded data with coach_flags for Emory and Stanford
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attention system overhaul testing complete (iteration 226). Key verified features: 1) Hero carousel shows ONLY heroEligible items (Emory P1 overdue + coach flag, Stanford P1 due in 3 days + coach flag), 2) Filter pills show 'All 2' and 'Urgent 2', 3) Hero badges show 'TOP PRIORITY', '2 DAYS OVERDUE', 'FLAGGED BY COACH' for Emory, 4) 'Keep things moving' section shows 2 medium-tier items (Florida, UCLA), 5) 'Just keep an eye' section shows 1 low-tier item (Creighton), 6) Summary card says 'Emory University and Stanford University need action first', 7) No console errors on pipeline page load.
